name: Birthday
heading: Birthday Rewards Notification
body:
Happy Birthday {{customer_name}}
Celebrate your special day with a touch of magic!

We've added {{birthday_points}} {{point_name}}to your account. Whether you've been eyeing something special or want to treat yourself to something new, now is the perfect time to indulge. Enjoy! 🎉

Redeem Now

name: CouponExpire
heading: Coupon Expiration Alert
body:
Act Fast Before It's Gone!
Your Exclusive Reward Awaits.

We wanted to give you a friendly reminder that your points redemption coupon will expire in just {{coupon_expiry_days}} days! Don't miss the chance to use your points and treat yourself to something special from our collection.

Redeem Now

Happy {{event_name}}
Exclusive Offers Await You.

Wishing you a joyous {{event_name}} celebration! As a token of our appreciation, we're thrilled to gift you {{event_points}} {{point_name}}. Use them to make your celebration even more memorable with us!

name: Newsletter
heading: Loyalty Program Newsletter
body:
Hello {{customer_name}}
Thank you for joining us!

We're thrilled to welcome you to our newsletter community. As a token of our appreciation, we're excited to award you {{newsletter_points}} {{point_name}} to kickstart your rewards journey.
By subscribing to our newsletter, you'll be among the first to receive exclusive updates, special offers, and exciting promotions straight to your inbox. From sneak peeks at new product launches to insider tips and subscriber-only discounts, we’re committed to keeping you informed and rewarding your loyalty.

Shop Now

{{{banner_image}}}
{{{body_children}}}

name: PointsExpire
heading: Points Expiration Notification
body:
Hi {{customer_name}} ,

We hope you're doing well. We regret to inform you that your {{point_name}} have expired.
We understand you may have been saving up for something special, and we apologize for any inconvenience this may cause. To continue enjoying our rewards program, we encourage you to stay active and keep earning points on your purchases.
Let’s get you back on track to earning and enjoying the benefits!

Show Points History

{{{banner_image}}}
{{{body_children}}}

name: ProfileCompletion
heading: Profile Completion Reward
body:
Congratulations You've Earned
{{profile_completion_points}} {{point_name}}

We’re excited to celebrate your achievement of earning {{profile_completion_points}} {{point_name}} with us! By completing your profile details, you’ve unlocked a world of rewards and benefits designed just for you.
Your commitment to sharing your information hasn’t gone unnoticed, and we’re delighted to show our appreciation. These {{point_name}} are a token of our gratitude for your trust and loyalty.
Enjoy your well-deserved rewards!

Redeem Rewards
emailTemplate:
{{{banner_image}}}
{{{body_children}}}

name: Purchase
heading: Points On Order Fulfillment Notification
body:
Congratulations, {{customer_name}}!
Your Earned Rewards Await!

We’re excited to congratulate you on your recent order! As a valued member of our loyalty program, you've earned {{point_name}} with your purchase.
Please note that your {{point_name}} will be credited shortly, but they will be processed after the return window for your order has closed. This ensures your rewards accurately reflect your final purchase, taking any returns or exchanges into account.
Thank you for being a part of our community. Happy shopping!

Shop More
emailTemplate:
{{{banner_image}}}
{{{body_children}}}

name: ReferAndEarn
heading: Refer & Earn Rewards
body:
Thank You {{customer_name}}!
Here’s a Token of Our Appreciation

We’re thrilled to let you know that your recent referral has led to a successful purchase! As a gesture of our gratitude, you’ve earned {{referral_points}} {{point_name}} 🌟
Thank you for spreading the word and being a valued part of our community. Your support means the world to us!

Redeem Now

{{{banner_image}}}
{{{body_children}}}

name: Rejoining
heading: Welcome Back Rewards
body:
Dear {{customer_name}},
We Miss You!

It's been a while since we last saw you on our website, and we truly miss having you around! To show our appreciation for your past support, we’re offering you {{rejoining_points}} {{point_name}} when you come back.
You can redeem these {{point_name}} for exciting rewards and discounts on your next purchase. We can't wait to welcome you back!

Rejoin Now

{{{banner_image}}}
{{{body_children}}}

heading: Welcome to Our Loyalty Program
body:
Congratulations You've Earned
{{signup_points}} {{point_name}}

Hi {{customer_name}} ,
Welcome to {{store_name}}! Your journey has just begun, and the excitement is real. By unlocking {{signup_points}} {{point_name}}, you're now ready to explore a world of endless possibilities.
Thank you for joining us on this adventure. We’re delighted to have you as part of our community!
Happy exploring!

name: UpgradedTrial
heading: Tier Upgrade Notification
body:
Hey {{customer_name}}
Congratulations!

We’re excited to share that you’ve been upgraded to the {{tier_name}} tier! Congratulations on reaching this incredible milestone!
Your continued support and loyalty mean the world to us, and we’re delighted to reward you with even more exclusive benefits and perks. As a valued member of our loyalty program, you now have access to a range of additional privileges, including:

  • Increased points earning rate on every purchase
  • Special discounts and promotions exclusively for members in your tier
  • Personalized offers tailored to your preferences

Enjoy your well-earned rewards — you deserve it!
Thank you for being a part of our community.

Explore Now
